ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software application */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software application */,
  "hosted_platform" INTEGER /* Indicator if the software is hosted on a cloud platform */,
  "on_premises_platform" INTEGER /* Indicator if the software is available for on-premises deployment */,
  "encryption_level" TEXT /* Level of encryption used for the software */,
  "multi_user_support" INTEGER /* Indicator if multi-user support is available */,
  "access_permissions" TEXT /* Description of access permissions for the software */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the software */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the software */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the software (e.g., active, deprecated, retired) */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., commercial, open source) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encryption_levels" (
  "encryption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encryption type */,
  "encryption_type" TEXT /* Type of encryption used (e.g., AES, HTTPS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the encryption method */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the encryption (e.g., 128, 256) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Encryption algorithm (e.g., AES, RSA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encryption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User, Guest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the role (e.g., 1 for Admin, 2 for User) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating the last update of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "ldap_integration" INTEGER /* Indicator if the user is integrated with LDAP */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating the last update of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the permission (e.g., data, settings, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating the last update of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role which has the permission */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the role-permission mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating the last update of the role-permission mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ldap_settings" (
  "ldap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for LDAP settings */,
  "ldap_url" TEXT /* URL of the LDAP server */,
  "ldap_port" INTEGER /* Port number used for LDAP connection */,
  "ldap_user_base" TEXT /* Base DN for LDAP users */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the LDAP settings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the LDAP settings were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating the last update of the LDAP settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ldap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspace_permissions" (
  "workspace_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace permission */,
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workspace to which permissions apply */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission granted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the workspace permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating the last update of the workspace permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workspace_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software related to the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating the last update of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspaces" (
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace */,
  "workspace_name" TEXT /* Name of the workspace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workspace */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the workspace */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the workspace was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating the last update of the workspace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspaces_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the action took place */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "client_info" TEXT /* Additional client information (e.g., browser, device) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
